items.title: C-GenReg: Training-Free 3D Point Cloud Registration by Multi-View-Consistent Geometry-to-Image Generation with Probabilistic Modalities Fusion
items.summary: Researchers introduce C-GenReg, a novel training-free method for 3D point cloud registration that leverages multi-view-consistent geometry-to-image generation and probabilistic modalities fusion.

items.title: Anthropic Launches Cowork, a Claude Desktop Agent for File Interaction Without Coding
items.summary: Anthropic has released Cowork, a new Claude Desktop agent designed to interact directly with user files, offering AI assistance without requiring any coding knowledge.

items.title: Why Cohere is Merging with Aleph Alpha
items.summary: Cohere and Aleph Alpha are merging, a significant consolidation in the AI industry that could reshape the competitive landscape for enterprise AI solutions.

items.title: Railway Secures $100 Million to Challenge AWS with AI-Native Cloud Infrastructure
items.summary: Railway has raised $100 million in funding to develop AI-native cloud infrastructure, aiming to compete directly with established giants like AWS.

items.title: Nous Research's NousCoder-14B: An Open-Source Coding Model Enters the Scene
items.summary: Nous Research has launched NousCoder-14B, an open-source coding model positioned to compete in the rapidly evolving landscape of AI-powered code generation.

items.title: Vista4D: Video Reshooting with 4D Point Clouds
items.summary: A new research paper introduces Vista4D, a technique that enables video reshooting by utilizing 4D point clouds for advanced scene manipulation.

items.title: EditCrafter: Tuning-Free High-Resolution Image Editing via Pretrained Diffusion Model
items.summary: EditCrafter presents a novel method for high-resolution image editing using a pretrained diffusion model, eliminating the need for fine-tuning.

items.title: Context Unrolling in Omni Models
items.summary: New research explores context unrolling techniques within omni models, aiming to enhance their ability to process and understand complex, multi-modal inputs.

items.title: Scaling Test-Time Compute for Agentic Coding
items.summary: This paper investigates methods for scaling test-time computational resources to improve the performance and efficiency of agentic coding systems.

items.title: I Built a Safe Autonomous Email Agent with OpenClaw and It Actually Works
items.summary: A developer shares their success in building a functional and safe autonomous email agent using the OpenClaw framework, highlighting its practical application.

items.title: Why Tokyo is the Most Important Tech Destination of 2026
items.summary: Tokyo is emerging as a critical hub for technology and AI innovation in 2026, attracting significant investment and talent.

items.title: I Spent Weeks Reverse-Engineering OpenClaw. Here's What Nobody Tells You.
items.summary: A developer recounts their experience reverse-engineering OpenClaw, revealing insights and challenges not commonly discussed about the platform.

items.title: Securely Deploying OpenClaw on a VPS With Enterprise Grade Access Control
items.summary: This article provides a guide on securely deploying the OpenClaw platform on a Virtual Private Server, incorporating enterprise-grade access control measures.

items.title: Kiro Forgets Everything Every Session. So I've Built It a Memory.
items.summary: A developer addresses the ephemeral memory of the Kiro AI by building a persistent memory system to enhance its conversational capabilities.

items.title: AI Scientists Produce Results Without Reasoning Scientifically
items.summary: A new paper explores the phenomenon of AI systems generating valid scientific results without explicitly demonstrating human-like scientific reasoning processes.
